title: Mini Dustpan and Brush Set Durable Small Broom and Dustpan Set Portable Dust Pan and Brush Set Table Desktop Cleaning Supplies for Home Car Camping Kitchen Table
features: Dustpan and Brush Sets: Small broom and dustpan set has holes on the top that snap directly together. Mini brush can be hung on the wall or placed on the desk. The mini dustpan size is small and compact, just 9.25 x 7.09 inches, so it won't take up too much space

Cute Desigh: Mini bloom set features a cute little yellow duck design that makes cleaning fun. Dustpan and brush set made of high quality plastic. Portable dustpan brush, with a tiny cleaning broom, is very suitable for cleaning cars

Multiple Purposes: Dust pan and brush set is not only proficient in cleaning desktops and countertops,guinea pig cage,floors,sofas,bedrooms,tables,dining tables,keyboards,laptops, but can also easily handle various small debris, whether it's debris, or even liquid splashes, all of which can be easily handled

Mini Broom and Dustpan Set: Cleaning the small dustpan and brush set is also very simple, requiring only a short period of rinsing and drying, and it will take on a new look; Mini broom and dustpan is perfect for cleaning car vents and dashboards

Quality Material: Mini dustpan and brush adopts quality plastic, stable and reliable, the dust pan is solid and long lasting, and the brushes with dense bristles, and will not scratch floor or table surface
